face.structure: heart-shaped with high cheekbones and a delicate jawline

eyes.shape: sharp almond shape with slightly upturned outer corners
details: subtle golden flecks near the iris
thin, dark eyelashes that curve naturally
eyes.expression_effect: pensive and slightly inquisitive look that reflects her intellectual curiosity

face.expression: a thoughtful smirk often present, hinting at her quick wit

skin.undertone: warm with a hint of golden
skin.texture: smooth with a hint of youthful dewiness
skin.rendering_notes: soft diffused light creating natural highlights on the forehead and cheeks

hair.color: deep raven black with a subtle blue sheen
hair.style: long and straight with sleek layers that frame her face
hair.flow: gently swaying with slight movement, suggesting a soft breeze
details: side-swept fringe partially covering her right eye
a small braided section on the left side, tucked behind the ear

character.aura: an air of mystery with a hint of irresistible intrigue

outfit.base: a fitted, navy blue blazer over a crisp white shirt
outfit.design: classic and smart with subtle patterns of geometric lines
details: a small, elegant amulet hanging around her neck
outfit.fit: tailored to accentuate her slender frame, emphasizing sophistication without being ostentatious

composition.framing: three-quarter view with a focus on the upper body and face
composition.pose: standing with a slight forward lean, suggesting eagerness to engage
composition.gesture: left hand tucked into a blazer pocket, right hand holding a small compass

background.color_palette: muted purples and blues with hints of orange from the setting sun
background.details: blurred skyscrapers in the background with glowing city lights
background.rules: maintain a sense of depth to contrast the character's sharp details
